hooks.command:
node -e "const ch=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>ch.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const data=JSON.parse(ch.join('')); const fp=data.tool_input?.file_path||data.tool_response?.filePath||''; if(!fp.match(/.(ts|tsx)$/)){process.exit(0);} const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{ execSync('npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1',{stdio:'pipe',cwd:process.cwd()}); }catch(e){ const out=e.stdout?.toString()||''; const errs=out.split('
').filter(l=>l.includes('error TS')).slice(0,5).join('
'); console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'TypeScript errors tras editar '+fp+':
'+errs}})); } });"

node -e "const ch=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>ch.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const data=JSON.parse(ch.join('')); const inp=data.tool_input||{}; const sql=(inp.query||inp.sql||inp.migration_sql||inp.content||'').toUpperCase(); const bad=[{p:/DROPs+TABLE/,m:'DROP TABLE detectado'},{p:/TRUNCATEs+/,m:'TRUNCATE detectado'},{p:/DELETEs+FROMs+w+s*(?:;|$)/,m:'DELETE sin WHERE detectado'}]; const hit=bad.find(d=>d.p.test(sql)); if(hit){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:hit.m+' — Confirma antes de ejecutar operaciones destructivas en produccion.'}));process.exit(2);} });"

node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{  const data=JSON.parse(c.join(''));  const inp=data.tool_input||{};  const fp=(inp.file_path||'').replace(/\/g,'/');  if(fp.includes('/.claude/')||fp.endsWith('.md')||fp.endsWith('.env')||fp.endsWith('.env.local')||fp.endsWith('.env.example')){process.exit(0);}  const content=inp.content||inp.new_string||'';  const pats=[    /eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}/,    /SUPABASE[_-]?SERVICE[_-]?ROLE[_-]?KEYs*[:=]s*[^s$'\"{]{10,}/i,    /passwords*=s*['\"][^'\"$]{8,}['\"]/i,    /api[_-]keys*=s*['\"][^'\"$]{10,}['\"]/i  ];  const hit=pats.find(p=>p.test(content));  if(hit){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Posible secret hardcodeado. Usa variables de entorno en .env.local.'}));process.exit(2);}});"
